parameters.query: SELECT comp.id AS competitor_id, comp.name AS comp_name, comp.domain AS comp_domain, c.id AS client_id, c.domain AS client_domain, k.keyword, k.id AS keyword_id FROM competitors comp JOIN clients c ON comp.client_id = c.id JOIN keywords k ON k.client_id = c.id WHERE c.status = 'active' AND k.is_tracked = true LIMIT 200

=INSERT INTO competitor_ranks (competitor_id, keyword_id, rank, url, recorded_at) VALUES ('{{$json.competitor_id}}', '{{$json.keyword_id}}', {{$json.rank || 'NULL'}}, {{$json.url ? "'" + $json.url + "'" : 'NULL'}}, CURRENT_DATE) ON CONFLICT (competitor_id, keyword_id, recorded_at) DO UPDATE SET rank = EXCLUDED.rank, url = EXCLUDED.url

=INSERT INTO agent_action_log (client_id, module, action_type, summary, status, triggered_by, created_at) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', 'intelligence', 'competitor_rank_check', 'Competitor {{$json.comp_name}} ranks #{{$json.rank || "N/A"}} for "{{$json.keyword}}"', 'success', 'n8n-competitor-monitor', NOW())
